title: Gary Groomes
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person

|occupation=[[Wikipedia:Voice acting|Voice artist]]<ref name="Soldier for the Empire">[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'']]</ref>

'''Gary Groomes''' voiced [[Xexus Shev]] and the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio drama version of ''Crimson Empire'']].<ref name="Crimson Empire">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>

Groomes also worked in [[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|the audio adaptation]] of the [[Star Wars: Dark Forces (novellas)|''Dark Forces'' novellas]], voicing various characters including [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Dol Donar II]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Horst (Keycard)|Horst]], [[Gorc]] and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Vig]].<ref name="Dark Forces">[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]]</ref>
